articles.title: Trump Set to Sign AI Cybersecurity Directive as Soon as Thursday - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: President Donald Trump is poised to issue an executive order as soon as Thursday aimed at bolstering artificial intelligence cybersecurity and has asked tech industry leaders to join for the event, according to people familiar with the matter.

articles.title: I Hiked Using Robot Legs in the Grand Canyon. I Didn’t Even Need My Cane - CNET
articles.description: After testing out the Hypershell X Ultra S exoskeleton on a Grand Canyon hike, I learned that this tech is a tool, not a cure for my disability. Here’s what it can do for you.
articles.content:
The Hypershell X Ultra S exoskeleton is designed to optimize your performance, whether you're hiking or biking.
Adam Doud/CNET
